description: mro.name is a personal website for Marcus Rohrmoser, linking to projects, talks, blog content, and the Seppo personal social web project. The site primarily presents informational pages and project hosting rather than a documented developer platform.
summary: No developer integration surfaces found on mro.name or its subdomains beyond public website content and a self-hosted software project page; no documented HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI endpoint on mro.name was identified.
